commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Telegram bot/self sender exception to supplemental-context allowlist filtering and a regression test that preserves `ReplyToBody` when a group user replies to a bot-sent message.

PR surface: Source +7, Tests +45. Total +52 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main sets `senderAllowed=false` for a bot/self reply target that is not in `effectiveGroupAllow`, and `contextVisibility: "allowlist"` then blocks the quote context; I did not run a live Telegram scenario in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is live Telegram proof or maintainer proof override for a visibility boundary, not an automated code repair.

target.title: fix(telegram): preserve bot-self reply target context under allowlist visibility (#82002)
